lines.text: The wind is too strong! We're taking on water, {Male=brother;Female=sister}. I need your help!
A new fish! A fish no one's ever laid eyes on! Oh, don't you dare die on me now. I won't let you rot away...
Uncle Ronald. I have to find Uncle Ronald, he's the finest taxidermist I know. He'll preserve your beauty forever.
No, stop. Don't eat me. Get off! Get off me!
Why are there so many? Ack! My legs... My arms... You're not taking me too!
Ah. {Male=Brother;Female=Sister}... How are you...? I saw you were... I saw it with my own eyes...
So you managed to escape from all those fish. Not only that, you also found your favorite fish!
Yes, yes. Now that we have everything we want, it's time to return home and enjoy their beauty together.
Haha... Haha... You... You'll be a better collector than I'll ever be once we're back... I'm so thrilled for you!
Oh, {Male=brother;Female=sister}! I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I didn't mean to kick you into the water... They just liked your taste better...
I didn't want to die... You reached out to pull me in, right? It was either you or me...
I saw those fish first! You can't take them from me! I'm the better collector! I'm the one and only genius!
If I bring these back to Madam Claire, she'll let me into her salon, right? No one will ever look down on us again.
You're finally back! Now I won't ever go hungry again! You must be exhausted from that trip, I'll prepare something for you to eat!
Oh, she wants to see us? Well, what are we waiting for? Let's go!
